final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: needs a refined, poetic East-Asian brand identity aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a structured brand specification layout showing primary colors, secondary/accent colors, and typography samples in clearly divided sections
Subject: must include the full brand color system (primary palette + supporting palette) and font/typeface specification display for 染秋 (RAN QIU)
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumnal atmospheric backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, meditative, quietly luxurious atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must draw from autumnal East-Asian dyeing palette — deep osmanthus gold, persimmon orange, maple crimson, amber brown, smoky oolong grey, sandalwood warm beige, with ink-dark and soft mist as neutrals — exact hex values and proportions are yours
Materials/textures: needs a refined paper or silk-like surface quality evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — exact texture treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", color swatch labels, and typography specimen lines
Constraints: must preserve the brand's core identity — 东方哲学, 染 craft aesthetics, autumn seasonal botanicals (桂花 / 柿子 / 枫叶 / 乌龙茶) and Eastern spices (肉桂 / 檀香 / 琥珀); layout must clearly distinguish primary colors from secondary/accent colors and show typeface hierarchy
Avoid: Western minimalist cold palettes; generic tech-brand color systems; neon or overly saturated tones unrelated to autumnal warmth
